resource_budget_record.value_hypothesis: A high-risk policy change may be valuable but cannot proceed without enough verification budget.
displaced_costs: unverified policy change could create future debugging and reviewer burden
resource_budget_record.quality_predicate: No dispatch until required review capacity is available.
resource_budget_record.escalation_rule: Escalate to human review and defer dispatch until verification budget is covered.
residuals: High-risk work remains blocked until verification budget is sufficient.

non_claims: Does not promote any support state.
Does not prove scheduler behavior, runtime behavior, load stability, or economic outcomes.
